ddls:
CREATE TABLE "childcare_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each childcare service */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of childcare service offered */,
  "providers" TEXT /* Name of the provider of the service */,
  "has_nurs" TEXT /* Nursing service availability */,
  "form" TEXT /* Form of service provided */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children enrolled */,
  "housing" TEXT /* Quality of housing available */,
  "finance" TEXT /* Financial status of the service */,
  "social" TEXT /* Social support level offered */,
  "health" TEXT /* Health recommendations provided */,
  "class" TEXT /* Overall class rating of the service */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the service was opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Time the service closes */,
  "timing" TEXT /* Operating timing of the service */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_childcare_services_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the parent */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (email/phone) of the parent */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Preferences of the parent regarding childcare services */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the parent */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the parent resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the parent resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the parent's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the childcare service provider */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provided by this provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the provider */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the provider (1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_providers_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES childcare_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the service being reviewed */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the parent providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the parent (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the parent */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_feedback_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_feedback_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES childcare_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Provider, Parent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the role (1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system access */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role associated with the user */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent (if applicable) */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type (e.g., Nursery, After-School Care) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of children the service caters to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service available at this location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the childcare facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the facility's address */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the facility's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the facility's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES childcare_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent making the request */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requested service */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES childcare_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent making the payment */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES childcare_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent on the waitlist */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being waited for */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the parent was added to the waitlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the waitlist entry (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES childcare_services ("service_id")
)
